title: Lesson 1247: 本質, 本体, 本音...

items.gloss: substance; real form; main part; main unit; body (of a machine); this machine; this appliance; object of worship (at a shrine, temple, etc.); noumenon; base price; pre-tax price
real intention; motive; true opinion; what one really thinks
home (of something); place famous for its ...; center (e.g. of manufacture); best place (for); place of origin; birthplace; cradle; morning session; last session in the morning
text (of a book, document, etc.); body (of a letter); this passage; this sentence
